ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Chili 35%, soybean oil 23%, garlic 18%, shallot 15%, salt 4%, sugar 3%, monosodium glutamate 1.3%, citric acid 0.5%, paprika oleoresin 0.2%
product_name: Richin, ground chili and garlic in soybean oil
